title: How Israel’s new ‘security belts’ could impact Middle East stability

snapshot.title: How Israel’s new ‘security belts’ could impact Middle East stability
snapshot.description: LONDON: In what it describes as a campaign of self-defense, Israel has seized approximately 1,000 sq. km of land in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria since October 2023 — about 5 percent of its territory within the 1949 borders, according to a recent analysis. The new zones of control, rights groups say, have displaced millions of people, razed residential areas and destroyed swathes of
snapshot.author: ANAN TELLO
snapshot.pageTitle: How Israel’s new ‘security belts’ could impact Middle East stability | Arab News
